footer.tagline: Practical AI prompts for indie creators.
footer.taglineSub: Copy, paste, and create results instantly.

refundPage.title: Refund Policy
refundPage.intro: PromptMarket operates a fair refund policy that takes into account the nature of digital products.
refundPage.section1Content: Digital products (prompt files) are generally non-refundable once downloaded. This is because digital goods cannot be returned once accessed.
refundPage.section2Content: Refunds may be granted in the following exceptional circumstances:
refundPage.refundCase1: The purchased file cannot be opened or downloaded
refundPage.refundCase2: The product content significantly differs from its description
refundPage.refundCase3: Duplicate payment for the same product
refundPage.refundCase4: Prompts do not function as described
refundPage.section3Content: To request a refund, please contact support@promto.kr within 7 days of purchase. Refund processing takes 3–5 business days after submission.
refundPage.section4Content: Approved refunds will be returned to the original payment method. For Stripe payments, it may take 3–10 business days to appear in your account depending on your card issuer.
refundPage.section5Content: Refund disputes will be handled in accordance with applicable consumer protection laws.

contentPage.title: Content Policy
contentPage.intro: PromptMarket enforces clear content policies to maintain a safe and trustworthy marketplace.
contentPage.section1Content: The following types of prompts are strictly prohibited:
contentPage.prohibited1: Content that promotes or facilitates illegal activities
contentPage.prohibited2: Content promoting hate speech, discrimination, or violence
contentPage.prohibited3: Prompts designed to generate adult (18+) content
contentPage.prohibited4: Content that infringes on others' copyrights
contentPage.prohibited5: Spam, misleading descriptions, or fraudulent content
contentPage.prohibited6: Content containing malicious code or security threats
contentPage.section2Content: All Creators are legally responsible for the content they upload. Prompt descriptions must accurately reflect the actual content. Exaggeration or false advertising is prohibited.
contentPage.violationStep3: 3rd violation: Permanent account ban and forfeiture of pending earnings
contentPage.section4Content: If you discover inappropriate content, use the 'Report' button on the product page or email report@promto.kr.

copyrightPage.title: Copyright Policy
copyrightPage.intro: PromptMarket respects intellectual property rights and protects the copyright of all Creators and buyers.
copyrightPage.section1Content: All prompts uploaded to PromptMarket remain the intellectual property of the respective Creator. The platform is granted only a non-exclusive license necessary to operate the service.
copyrightPage.section2Content: All Creators may only upload prompts they have personally created. The following activities are strictly prohibited:
copyrightPage.prohibited1: Copying and reselling another Creator's prompts without permission
copyrightPage.prohibited2: Re-uploading existing products with minor modifications
copyrightPage.prohibited3: Using copyrighted text or structures without authorization
copyrightPage.section3Content: Buyers may use purchased prompts in personal and commercial projects. However, reselling or redistributing the prompt files themselves to third parties is strictly prohibited.
copyrightPage.section4Content: If you discover content that infringes your copyright, please contact copyright@promto.kr. Confirmed infringements will result in content removal within 24 hours.

cookiePage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePage.intro: PromptMarket uses cookies to provide a better user experience. This policy explains how we use cookies.
cookiePage.section1Content: Cookies are small data files stored in your browser when you visit a website. They are used for various functions such as maintaining login sessions and remembering language preferences.
cookiePage.cookie1Desc: Essential cookies for maintaining Supabase authentication sessions. They keep you logged in.
cookiePage.cookie4Desc: Remembers which announcements you have dismissed.
cookiePage.section3Content: You can refuse cookies in your browser settings. However, refusing essential cookies may prevent certain features like login from working properly.
cookiePage.section4Content: PromptMarket complies with GDPR and applicable privacy laws. We will request consent before using analytical cookies.

dmcaPage.title: DMCA Copyright Notice
dmcaPage.intro: PromptMarket complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) and responds promptly to copyright infringement notices.
dmcaPage.section1Title: How to File a DMCA Notice
dmcaPage.section1Content: If you believe content on PromptMarket infringes your copyright, please send an email to dmca@promto.kr with the following information:
dmcaPage.requirement1: Your name and contact information (or your authorized agent)
dmcaPage.requirement2: Description of the original copyrighted work and a link to it
dmcaPage.requirement3: The URL of the infringing content on PromptMarket
dmcaPage.requirement4: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information is accurate
dmcaPage.step3: Infringing content removed immediately upon confirmation
dmcaPage.section3Content: If you believe your content was removed in error, you may submit a counter-notice to dmca@promto.kr. We will review the counter-notice and determine whether to restore the content.
dmcaPage.section4Content: All DMCA-related inquiries should be directed to dmca@promto.kr.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: PromptMarket values your privacy and complies with all applicable privacy laws.
privacyPage.section1Content: Email address (for newsletter subscriptions and free sample requests), payment information (processed through Stripe; not stored by us), service usage logs and account information.
privacyPage.section2Content: To send new product announcements and discount information, deliver purchase confirmations and download links, and improve our services and provide customer support.
privacyPage.section3Content: We retain your data until you unsubscribe or request deletion. Some information may be retained for legally required periods.
privacyPage.section4Content: We do not share your personal data with third parties without your consent. Necessary information is shared with Stripe for payment processing.
privacyPage.section5Content: We use cookies to maintain login sessions and store language preferences. See our Cookie Policy for details.
privacyPage.section6Content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time. Contact: privacy@promto.kr

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using PromptMarket.
termsPage.section1Content: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the digital product sales service provided by PromptMarket ("Service").
termsPage.section2Content: Purchased digital products (prompt files) may be used for personal and commercial projects. Reselling or redistributing the files themselves is prohibited.
termsPage.section3Content: Creators selling prompts must only upload original content they have personally created. Accounts may be suspended for misleading descriptions, copyright infringement, or spam content.
termsPage.section4Content: The quality of AI-generated content from prompts may vary depending on changes in AI service providers. PromptMarket is not liable for such changes.
termsPage.section5Content: PromptMarket may terminate accounts or restrict service access without prior notice in case of Terms of Service violations.

hero.badge: AI Prompt Market for Indie Creators

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Find answers to your questions below

contactForm.title: Contact Us
contactForm.desc: Couldn't find the answer in the FAQ? Fill out the form below.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your issue in detail.
contactForm.success: ✅ Your inquiry has been received. We'll respond within 1–2 business days.
contactForm.error: Failed to submit inquiry. Please email support@promto.kr directly.

items.q: Where can I download purchased prompts?
items.a: After payment, download from My Account > Purchase History. A download link is also included in your confirmation email.
We support international credit/debit cards via Stripe. Additional payment methods are coming soon.

items.q: How do I request a refund?
items.a: Email support@promto.kr with your order number and reason within 7 days of purchase. Refunds may be limited after download.

items.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.a: Cancel anytime from My Account > Settings > Subscription. You'll retain access until the current period ends.
Yes! After signing up, go to 'Start Selling' to list your products. A 30% platform fee applies per sale (you keep 70% by default).
Earnings from the previous month are settled on the 1st of each month. Register your payout account in your Creator profile.

items.q: How long does prompt review take?
items.a: Typically 1–3 business days. Prompts that comply with our content policy are approved quickly.
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. A reset link will be sent to your email.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Email support@promto.kr to request account deletion. It will be processed after purchases and payouts are settled.

items.q: Can I link a social login account?
items.a: We currently support Google login. More social login options are coming soon.

items.q: How many free tests do I get in Playground?
items.a: Free accounts get 3 tests/day. Pro plan gets 20/day, and Premium gets unlimited.

items.q: What AI models does Playground support?
items.a: We currently support text generation (GPT-4o), image generation (DALL-E 3), and video prompt optimization. More AI model upgrades are planned.
